# Vendored Parser

`acorn.js` is the CommonJS distribution from Acorn 8.17.0.

- Source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/acorn/v/8.17.0

The tracked syntax check invokes this parser with `ecmaVersion: 5`. No package
installation is required in a fresh checkout.
